articles.title: Healey aims to close great divide of resale ticket prices with new proposal
articles.description:
Dubbed “The Great Divide Act,” the legislation would cap resale prices, limit fees, and prohibit deceptive practices.

The post Healey aims to close great divide of resale ticket prices with new proposal appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Healey introduces 'The Great Divide Act' to regulate ticket resale prices in Massachusetts.
Proposal includes caps on resale prices and limits on fees for consumers.
Boston residents may benefit from fairer ticket pricing and reduced deceptive practices.
